assets.rationale: Synthetic historical bars are permitted only behind verified canonical replay cases.
Fixture replay construction is historical-only and must never enter a LIVE graph.
Deterministic provider double exists only for committee unit tests.
Captured TradingView adapter payload is consumed only by node:test fixtures.
Design sandbox components and generated previews are visual donors, not runtime truth.
Screenshots and pasted build prompts are design references, never market evidence.
